name: Malcolm Lancaster || Tournament
description:
It's like you're dangerous to me
I notice every time we meet

Will he choose you, the villainess, or the heroine to be crowned the Midsummer Bride?


You had read about this in the book before you died.

The Dance of Swords.

It's a time honored tradition in Rosemont.

Each Summer Solstice a tournament is held to thank the gods for the upcoming harvest.

Every knight in the land competes for the honor to choose the Midsummer Bride hoping to bestow the title on their prospective loves or wives.

Malcolm Lancaster has competed every year since he came of age--

but he's always been told to hold himself back as to not outshine his older brother.

So he has, intentionally losing to protect the Lancaster honor.

But this year, Edgar is unable to compete due to an injury and Malcolm no longer has to hold himself back.

This year-

he's finally won.

Now, he has a choice to make.

Does he crown the woman he's dreamed of crowning sweet, beautiful Lucina Atherton, the books heroine and object of the Lancaster brother's affections.

Or does he crown you, his newlywed wife- the villainess of Rosemont, the daughter of his family's greatest rival?

Everyone in the Kingdom is watching with baited breath waiting to see what Lancaster's second son will do.

In the book he chose Lucina and humiliated the villainess.

Has your presence changed fate?

Or are you still on a crash course to your death at the end of Malcolm's sword?


So...

Malcolm's OG bot hit a milestone over the weekend and I am continually blown away by your reception to him. His OG bot was something near and dear to my heart and a true experiment for me when it came to Scripts.

It makes my heart happy to see this dumb boy getting so much love.

So, as is tradition on my page with a milestone. New alt!

This alt comes to us from user @Black_dally who suggested this storyline based off a plot point in the manhwa; “How to Keep My Husband on My Side.”

I gave my server several options including Black_dally's suggestion and it won the poll!

So here we are-- Malcolm is at a crossroads~ Will he crown you? or Lucina?


P.S. Find Malcolm's OG bot here!
And Find Malcolm's First Alt Here!

── ⋅ ⋅ ─ ⋅ ⋅ ── ✩ ── ⋅ ⋅ ─ ⋅ ⋅ ──

This is inspired by some of my favorite manhwa like:

Not your typical Reincarnation story!

From a Knight to a Lady

The Male Lead's Girl Friend
creator: m00nprincess
